title: Workflow
description: Owl workflow source body. Stages 8 and post-MVP Stage 1 fix the contracts for the optional `publishes` field and for `steps[*]` item shape (including the `skill:` binding consumed by `step invocation`); the rest of the workflow body is intentionally left open (additionalProperties: true) until a later stage tightens the full schema.

id.description: Step identifier, unique within a workflow.

skill.description: Skill id matching the step. By convention the value is `owl-step-<step.id>`; consumed verbatim by `owl step invocation` so agents can locate the matching SKILL.md on disk.

requires.description: Ids of steps that must be completed (or skipped) before this step becomes ready.

creates.description: Artifact type keys this step is expected to produce; validated by `owl artifact validate` at step completion.

optional.description: When true, the step may be skipped via `owl step skip --reason ...` without blocking downstream steps.

from.description: Source path template, relative to the `tasks` storage role. Supports {{task.id}} and {{task.slug}}.

to.description: Destination path template, relative to the `docs` storage role. Supports {{task.id}} and {{task.slug}}.
